message:
refactor(oauth): replace manual token construction with real auth flow in tests

Extract issue_access_token_via_auth_code helper that drives the full
OAuth authorization code grant (authorize -> token exchange) instead of
manually inserting OAuthToken structs into internal server state. This
makes the token validation and token verifier tests exercise the real
issuance pipeline end-to-end rather than bypassing it:

- test_token_validation: now obtains access token via authorize() +
  token() instead of writing directly to state.access_tokens
- test_token_verifier: same refactor, plus updates hardcoded
  "valid-value" references to use the actual issued token string

The helper uses PKCE plain method with a static verifier for
deterministic test behavior while still exercising the full code path.

Also syncs .beads/issues.jsonl with latest issue state updates.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
